transcription.text: Good as these cleaners are, you can spray and spray all night and day with them and still have lots of germs because you can't clean germs. You have to kill them. You need Lysol Direct. Direct is more than a grease cutter. It's a real Lysol disinfectant, too. Just cleaning, you've still got germs. Get Lysol Direct because you can't clean germs. You have to kill them. And now there's new Lysol Direct Smart Pack Refill with the Easy Pour Spout. It helps you save money and reduce trash, too. New from Lysol Direct. New from Lysol Direct.
